title: Dinki Disco
description: Get ready to wiggle, giggle and boogie! Our Children’s Disco is a joyful burst of family fun for 0–6s and their grown-ups but older children are very welcome to join the fun! Expect baby disco beats, action songs, giant parachute games, bubbles galore and plenty of old-fashioned silliness. We’ll kick off with high-five meet & greets, warm-up dances, and toe-tapping tunes then dive into inflatable instruments fun for some noisy, giggly musical play. Little ones can bounce, wiggle or throw their best shapes — whether that’s gentle bouncing in arms or full-on freestyle moves on the dancefloor. It’s all about exploring music through movement, however little (or big!) that looks. Come for the dancing, stay for the smiles, laughs and family fun. Big fun for tiny dancers!
